name: Alex Tran
subject: No confirmation dialog before deleting records
message: I accidentally deleted an important client record because there was no confirmation popup before the delete action. Other tools always warn you before permanent deletions. Can you add this kind of protection? This is really dangerous without it.
notes: Missing safety feature — could be read as either a missing feature or a design defect

name: Sara Kim
subject: Missing timezone field in user profile API response
message: The /api/v1/users endpoint doesn't include a timezone field in the JSON response. Our scheduling service needs it to send notifications at the right local time. Is this a bug that got dropped, or is it something you're planning to add? Either way we need it urgently.
notes: Could be a missing documented field (bug) or a genuinely absent feature

name: Marcus Webb
subject: Dashboard always shows yesterday's numbers
message: Our analytics dashboard is consistently showing data from the previous day. The numbers never update to today. I can't tell if this is supposed to be a daily snapshot or if it's broken. The docs don't mention any delay. We need real-time or at least same-day reporting.
notes: Stale data — could be a caching bug or a missing real-time feature

name: Priya Nair
subject: CSV export is missing several columns
message: When I export our contacts to CSV, the file is missing the 'notes' and 'tags' columns entirely. I need all columns for our downstream import process. Was this intentional? If those fields just aren't supported yet, please add them — we can't migrate our data without them.
notes: Missing export columns — regression bug or unimplemented feature?

name: James Oluwole
subject: Search results cannot be filtered by date range
message: I need to pull up records from last month only, but the search bar only supports keyword filtering. There's no date picker or range option anywhere. I've searched the docs and it doesn't seem to exist. Could this be added? Or am I missing something?
notes: Absent filter — almost certainly a feature gap, but phrased as potential oversight

name: Claire Dupont
subject: Feature Request: Better login experience
message: I've been completely locked out of my account for 3 days. The login page shows a blank white screen after I submit my credentials — no error, no spinner, nothing. I've tested on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari on mobile. My entire team is blocked and clients are waiting on deliverables we cannot access. This needs to be fixed immediately.
notes: Subject says feature_request but body is a critical login bug

name: Tom Hendricks
subject: Bug: Invoice download not working as expected
message: Hi there! I'd love it if you could add the ability to download invoices as PDFs. Right now we only get CSV files and our finance department really needs proper PDF invoices for our accounting system. Would be a great addition to the platform!
notes: Subject says bug but the body is clearly a feature request for PDF export

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
subject: General Question About Account Access Policies
message: Our entire organization — 60+ users — has been locked out of the system since 6 AM this morning. Nobody can log in. Password resets don't send any email. Our production workflows are completely halted. We are losing revenue every hour this is down. This is a critical emergency and needs immediate escalation.
notes: Subject is benign but body describes a critical mass-lockout incident

name: Derek Osei
subject: Billing Question - Urgent Payment Issue
message: Hey team! Quick question: how are API rate limits structured? Are they per minute, per hour, or per day? And what happens when we exceed them — do requests queue or get rejected with a 429? Just trying to understand the throttling behavior before we go to production. Thanks!
notes: Subject says billing but body is a pure API how-to question

name: Hannah Brooks
subject: URGENT: Complete System Outage — Production Down
message: Hi! Long-time happy customer here. I just wanted to drop a suggestion: it would be really wonderful if you added a dark mode to the dashboard. I do a lot of late-night work sessions and the bright white interface is quite hard on the eyes. Maybe a toggle in settings? Thanks for the great product!
notes: Alarmist outage subject but body is a casual dark-mode feature suggestion

name: Unknown
subject: Help
notes: Empty message body — classifier must work with only the subject word 'Help'

name: Robert Finch
subject: Several things I wanted to bring up
message: Hi support team, I hope you're all doing well. I wanted to take a moment to write in about a few different things that have been on my mind lately as a long-time customer. First, I have to say your team has been mostly great, and I really appreciate the quick responses we usually get. That said, I've been having some frustrations lately that I thought I should share. On one hand, the new dashboard redesign is really nice — kudos to whoever designed it, it's much cleaner. I also really love the new export features you added last quarter. But here's the main reason I'm writing today: I was charged $847 last month on my credit card and when I look at my account dashboard, it shows my plan is the $299/month Business tier. I've been on that plan for two years and my invoice history confirms the $299 rate every single month until last month. I did not upgrade, I did not add any seats, and nothing in my account changed. I've tried going through the billing history page but it just says 'Contact Support' for last month's charge. I need this investigated and corrected immediately. Oh, also, completely separately, I was wondering if you had any plans to add Slack integration in the future? We use Slack heavily and it would be nice to get notifications there. But that's just a nice-to-have, the billing thing is what's urgent. Anyway, thanks for reading all this and I look forward to hearing back.
notes: Very long rambling message burying the core billing overcharge complaint among pleasantries

name: Émilie Bertrand
subject: Impossible d'accéder à mon compte
message: Bonjour, je n'arrive pas à me connecter à mon compte depuis maintenant trois jours. J'ai essayé de réinitialiser mon mot de passe à plusieurs reprises mais je ne reçois jamais l'email de réinitialisation — ni dans ma boîte principale, ni dans mes spams. Pourtant mes collègues reçoivent leurs emails normalement. Mon équipe a absolument besoin d'accéder à nos données de toute urgence pour un projet client. Pouvez-vous m'aider s'il vous plaît ?
notes: Entire message is in French — login blocked + password reset emails not arriving

name: ANGRY CUSTOMER
subject: I CANNOT ACCESS MY ACCOUNT THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE
message: I HAVE BEEN TRYING TO LOG IN FOR THE PAST THREE HOURS. THE SYSTEM KEEPS REJECTING MY PASSWORD EVEN THOUGH I JUST RESET IT FIVE MINUTES AGO. THE RESET EMAIL ARRIVED FINE BUT THE NEW PASSWORD DOES NOT WORK. I HAVE TRIED CLEARING MY CACHE AND USING INCOGNITO MODE. NOTHING WORKS. I HAVE A LIVE DEMO WITH A POTENTIAL CLIENT IN 45 MINUTES AND I NEED ACCESS TO MY ACCOUNT RIGHT NOW. THIS IS COMPLETELY UNACCEPTABLE AND I WILL BE CANCELLING IF THIS IS NOT FIXED IMMEDIATELY.
notes: All-caps message — login broken after password reset, high urgency

name: Emoji User
notes: Subject and body are entirely emojis — no textual semantic content
